comment.body:
all what we know:
- UA doesn't recognize the souverinity of Crimea. It is written in its military docrine that it will take back Crimea via military force.
- Russia made it clear that it supports Crimea. Also the regions souverinity ... UA didn't, it wanted to be a NATO member, NATO was ready to take it, despite its own rules (no membership, if there is a war conflict), and Russia invaded UA.
- EU globalized the war, meaning, generated a global problem of it. Democrats and EU sent weapons, money and drill sergeants to UA, they don't accept Russia's standpoint.
- The war is lost for UA.
- Trump wants to solve the decades of conflict with Putin, but for that he must accept some of his standpoints. 
- Putin wants a buffer zone, no NATO soldiers on the borders, not even in UA, etc. the Paris agreement I talked about... old story, that the NATO didn't respect.
- Trump has to force EU to accept Putin's asks: via tariffs, withdrawing military aid, finance aid, etc. 
- EU responds to it with looking for a new ally. China. Predicted before it happened.
- China wants US to fall. It offers better party for Russia and ME, they took it for now, but they go to US if US solves the problems.
- Trump went hard against Xi, to force him to negotiate to not take EU.

comment.body:
- Xi took the fight, and US is in trouble, bcs US alienates its allies, and it strenghtens the BRICS.
- eventho Xi offered many times that he is opened to talk with Trump... he was the first, if you look back (not Trump) 
- Investors have lost confidence in the US, they withdraw money for now. If US repairs the problems, they are back, if it doesn't, they aren't.
- Trump must fight stagflation. Recession is necessary. But hte China tariff war is concerning.
- Russia and ME desires to see more dimplomacy, and less dick-comparsion
- Trump said to EU that if they don't want to accept peace, he is out, and won't help EU anymore. He will make his own ally with Russia without EU. 
However... this was the leverage that the US could offer for Russia
- China plays for destroying NATO unity. If it is lost, and US is in trouble (full of debt), it can pressure US more via a blockade on the first island line
